title: Full revert to Version 3 site with current footer preserved

requirements.text: Rebuild the entire public-facing frontend from scratch to match the Version 3 design and content exactly. This includes: the top navigation bar (Inside Pet Tech logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/inside-pet-tech-logo.png, category links for Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, and Market Trends, no admin/sign-in links visible), the homepage hero/featured article section (large editorial layout showing the most recent featured article regardless of content type, with thumbnail image, category tag, headline, summary, author, and published date), the Latest News grid (recent published articles with thumbnail, category tag, headline, summary, author, date), category spotlight sections for all four categories (Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, Market Trends) with section headers and article cards, the About page at /about, the Contact page at /contact with advertising opportunity mention, the article detail page, and the category listing pages. All typography (Playfair Display headlines, Inter body), colors (deep crimson-to-indigo gradient accents, off-white/light-gray background, dark near-black text), spacing, card layouts, button styles, section headers, and body copy must match Version 3.

quotes: PLEASE go back to version 3 in full. But add the footer section.

acceptanceCriteria: Top navigation bar shows the original Inside Pet Tech logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/inside-pet-tech-logo.png
Navigation bar contains exactly four category links: Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, Market Trends
No sign-in or admin links are visible in the public navigation
Homepage hero section displays the most recent featured article with thumbnail, category tag, headline, summary, author, and published date in a large editorial layout
Latest News grid displays recent published articles with thumbnail, category tag, headline, summary, author, and date
All four category spotlight sections (Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, Market Trends) appear on the homepage with article cards
About page exists at /about with Version 3 content and styling
Contact page exists at /contact with Version 3 content, contact form, and advertising opportunities mention
Article detail page displays headline, author, published date, category tag, content type badge, hero image or video embed, full body content, and related articles section
Category listing pages display filtered published articles for each of the four categories
Typography uses Playfair Display for headlines and Inter for body text throughout
Color scheme uses deep crimson-to-indigo gradient accents against off-white/light-gray background with dark near-black text

requirements.text: Preserve the current post-Version-7 footer exactly as-is in the rebuilt site. The footer must include: the newsletter signup section (email input wired to the subscribeToNewsletter backend call), About and Contact page links, all four category links (Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, Market Trends), site description, tagline 'Covering the Companies, Technology, and Ideas Reshaping Pet Care', and the caffeine.ai attribution badge. Do not revert the footer to the Version 3 state.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer contains a functional newsletter signup form that calls the backend subscribeToNewsletter function
Footer displays About and Contact navigation links
Footer displays all four category links: Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, Market Trends
Footer displays the tagline 'Covering the Companies, Technology, and Ideas Reshaping Pet Care'
Footer displays the caffeine.ai attribution badge
Footer displays the site description / brand info for Inside Pet Tech

requirements.text: Ensure the backend Motoko actor is fully intact and compatible with the rebuilt frontend. The actor must expose all required endpoints: article CRUD (createArticle, updateArticle, deleteArticle, publishArticle, archiveArticle, getPublishedArticles, getFeaturedArticles, getArticleBySlug, getArticlesByCategory, getAllArticles), admin management (addAdmin, removeAdmin, isAdmin, claimInitialAdmin), newsletter subscription (subscribeToNewsletter, getNewsletterSubscribers), and user profile (saveCallerUserProfile, getCallerUserProfile). The backend must retain its existing seeded sample articles so the site renders populated content on first load.

quotes: PLEASE go back to version 3 in full

acceptanceCriteria: Backend compiles without errors
All public article query functions return data correctly
Admin-only mutation functions enforce principal-based access control
claimInitialAdmin is a no-op once at least one admin exists
Newsletter subscription stores email and timestamp
Seeded sample articles exist so the homepage and category pages render populated content

constraints: The footer must NOT be reverted — it must match the current post-Version-7 footer with newsletter signup, About/Contact links, category links, tagline, and caffeine.ai badge
The Navbar logo must use frontend/public/assets/generated/inside-pet-tech-logo.png — no generic or placeholder logo
Admin/sign-in entry points must not be visible in any public-facing navigation
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Introducing any new pages or features beyond what existed in Version 3
Changing the backend data schema or adding new backend endpoints
Modifying the admin dashboard layout or functionality
Adding new categories beyond the four: Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, Market Trends
